metadata.description: Structured project context management for Claude Code — session continuity, brainstorm-first workflow, context optimization, and smart routing.

plugins.name: project-context
plugins.description: Maintain project context across sessions with structured markdown files, brainstorm-first workflow, context optimization (compact + organize), federated dependency graph for monorepos, and smart routing with session continuity.

plugins.name: project-context-mini
plugins.description: Minimal project context for Claude Code — four lean, Mermaid-friendly files (architecture, flows, patterns, status) and two skills (update, load). Companion to the full project-context plugin.
